landing.tagline: From script to storyboard to video

hero.title: Turn scripts and EPUBs into AI-produced comic videos.
hero.description: AI Comic Builder helps you parse stories, extract characters, generate frames, build video prompts, and render short-form comic videos inside one production workspace.

preview.title: Designed for repeatable production
preview.description: Move from idea to publishable assets without stitching tools together by hand.

items.title: Script parsing
items.description: Break raw scripts into structured episodes, shots, and character entities.

items.title: Storyboard generation
items.description: Generate keyframes, scene references, and prompt-ready shot descriptions.

items.title: Video pipeline
items.description: Create video prompts, render clips, and assemble output for each episode.

features.title: Core product capabilities
features.description: Everything needed to operate an AI comic-to-video pipeline from one dashboard.

items.title: Story understanding
items.description: Parse scripts or EPUB content into projects, episodes, and story beats.

items.title: Character consistency
items.description: Manage main and guest characters with descriptions and reference imagery.

items.title: Frame generation
items.description: Create keyframes and scene reference frames with configurable image models.

items.title: Video generation
items.description: Produce shot videos from prompts and stitch them into final episode outputs.

workflow.title: How the workflow fits together
workflow.description: The app is organized around the actual production pipeline instead of isolated generators.

items.title: 1. Import and structure
items.description: Start from a script or EPUB, then generate project structure, episodes, and shot breakdowns.

items.title: 2. Generate visual assets
items.description: Create characters, first frames, last frames, and scene references for each shot.

items.title: 3. Render and assemble
items.description: Generate video prompts, render clips with supported models, and assemble the final episode.

cta.title: Start building your production workspace
cta.description: Create an account to save projects, manage assets, and continue your pipeline across sessions.

auth.loginTitle: Sign in to continue your projects.
auth.registerTitle: Create an account for AI Comic Builder.
auth.loginDescription: Access your saved projects, storyboard pipeline, and model settings from one secure workspace.
auth.registerDescription: Create a real account to keep your projects, claim earlier anonymous work, and continue production across devices.
auth.loginCardDescription: Enter your email and password to open your workspace.
auth.registerCardDescription: Use email and password sign-up to start managing your projects.
auth.unknownError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

admin.title: Sign in to the admin console.
admin.description: Use the independent admin password to review platform health, user growth, task activity, and storage usage.
admin.loginCardDescription: This area is isolated from normal user accounts.
admin.disabledHint: Set ADMIN_PASSWORD to enable the admin console.
admin.overviewDescription: This MVP surfaces application-level operational metrics without mixing admin access into normal user accounts.
admin.taskStatusDescription: Current counts for async work tracked by the pipeline.
admin.importStatusDescription: Latest import log counts grouped by status.
admin.storageDescription: Disk usage measured from the database file and upload directory.
admin.modelAccessDescription: Environment-level model connectivity and configured ingestion volume.
admin.projectsListDescription: Newest project records with owner and status.
admin.failedTasksDescription: Newest failed pipeline tasks for quick inspection.
admin.recentActivityDescription: Newest project and task records in the system.
admin.unknownError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
